title: Mahoraga Warden
description: Eight-Handled Sword Divergent Sila Divine General Mahoraga
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7753cac741179877388f542fc799ea7ccdbc5681.png)

Mahoraga Warden - this resource pack replaces the Warden model with a Eight-Handled Sword Divergent Sila Divine General Mahoraga

![Optifine Required!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ff81729cb4c22029e6b1213e0a590158249125f.png)

This pack uses an OptiFine feature called Custom Entity Models (CEM)
